briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the I2C1 clock (I2C1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the I2C1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the I2C1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the I2C3 clock (I2C3CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the I2C3 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C3 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the I2C3 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C3 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the USART1 clock (USART1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the USART1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK2 PCLK2 selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_LSE SE selected as USART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the USART1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK2 PCLK2 selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the USART2 clock (USART2CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the USART2 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the USART2 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPUART1 clock (LPUART1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPUART1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPUART1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPTIM1 clock (LPTIM1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPTIM1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_HSI LSI selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPTIM1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPTIM1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_HSI System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPTIM2 clock (LPTIM2CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPTIM2 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_HSI LSI selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPTIM2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPTIM2 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_HSI System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the RNG clock.

simplesect.para: USB, RNG and SDMMC1 peripherals share the same 48MHz clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the RNG clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_MSI MSI selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLLSAI1 PLLSAI1 Clock selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLL PLL Clock selected as RNG clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the RNG clock.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_MSI MSI selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLLSAI1 PLLSAI1 "Q" clock (PLL48M2CLK) selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLL PLL "Q" clock (PLL48M1CLK) selected as RNG clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the ADC clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_ADCCLKSOURCE_NONE No clock selected as ADC clock
RCC_ADCCLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as ADC clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the I2C1 clock (I2C1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the I2C1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the I2C1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C1 clock
RCC_I2C1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the I2C3 clock (I2C3CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the I2C3 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C3 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the I2C3 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as I2C3 clock
RCC_I2C3CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as I2C3 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the USART1 clock (USART1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the USART1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK2 PCLK2 selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_LSE SE selected as USART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the USART1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK2 PCLK2 selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART1 clock
RCC_USART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the USART2 clock (USART2CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the USART2 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the USART2 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as USART2 clock
RCC_USART2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as USART2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPUART1 clock (LPUART1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPUART1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPUART1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_HSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPUART1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPTIM1 clock (LPTIM1CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPTIM1 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_HSI LSI selected as LPTIM1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPTIM1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPTIM1 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_HSI System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM1CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the LPTIM2 clock (LPTIM2CLK).

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the LPTIM2 clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_HSI LSI selected as LPTIM2 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPTIM2 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the LPTIM2 clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_PCLK1 PCLK1 selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSI HSI selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_HSI System Clock selected as LPUART1 clock
RCC_LPTIM2CLKSOURCE_LSE LSE selected as LPUART1 clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to configure the RNG clock.

simplesect.para: USB, RNG and SDMMC1 peripherals share the same 48MHz clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the RNG clock source. This parameter can be one of the following values:
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_MSI MSI selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLLSAI1 PLLSAI1 Clock selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLL PLL Clock selected as RNG clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the RNG clock.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_MSI MSI selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLLSAI1 PLLSAI1 "Q" clock (PLL48M2CLK) selected as RNG clock
RCC_RNGCLKSOURCE_PLL PLL "Q" clock (PLL48M1CLK) selected as RNG clock

briefdescription.para: Macro to get the ADC clock source.

parameterdescription.para:
clock source can be one of the following values:
RCC_ADCCLKSOURCE_NONE No clock selected as ADC clock
RCC_ADCCLKSOURCE_SYSCLK System Clock selected as ADC clock
